title: OmniProject backend vendor
description: A system-of-record backend: the neutral manifest plus its n8n binding. One file per vendor under vendors/backends/<id>.json.

via.description: How this backend authenticates / is wired (human-readable, for the wizard).

keyFormat.description: The shape of the key required to reach this vendor (used to hard-reject keyless access and to scaffold credentials).

nomenclature.description: Canonical label-catalogue key → this vendor's preferred word (a one-click nomenclature preset).

fields.description: Canonical fields this backend CONTRIBUTES to the superset (each validated against assets/schema/field.schema.json by gen-fields and merged in, dedup by key). Use when a backend exposes a field not yet in the registry.

fieldKeys.description: Canonical field keys this backend exposes/maps. MUST be a strict subset of the superset — enforced by the guard-superset CI check (a backend can only reference fields that exist).

statusVocabulary.description: This vendor's native status dialect mapped to canonical statuses (data, below the seam).

authHeader.description: n8n expression for the per-user Authorization header value.
